hold.hold_reason: Timestamp-safe BTC/ETH exchange netflow provider access and qfa on-chain ingestion support were not available in this checkout/environment; the hypothesis remains valid but externally blocked.
hold.unblock_condition: Provide reproducible real-provider API access and documented publication lag/revision policy for BTC/ETH exchange inflow/outflow/netflow; add/enable qfa ingestion without CSV fixtures or OHLCV proxies.

source_provider_checks.result: No Glassnode, CryptoQuant, Coin Metrics, Nansen, on-chain, or exchange-netflow adapter support found; qfa supports crypto OHLCV bars via Alpaca only, which is prohibited as a flow proxy for AR-144.
No environment variables with names containing GLASSNODE, CRYPTOQUANT, COINMETRICS, COIN_METRICS, NANSEN, SANTIMENT, or INTOTHEBLOCK were present.
Python import checks: glassnode=false, coinmetrics=false, nansen=false; requests and pandas available but no credentials/access endpoint was available.

data_source_provenance.reason: No credentialed/API-accessible source and no qfa on-chain ingestion adapter were available; no provider payloads were downloaded or retained.

candidate_pool.expansion: No expansion beyond BTC/ETH until exchange-label coverage, timestamp discipline, and liquidity gates pass.

selected_universe.reason: Provider data gate failed before signal/evaluation construction.

random_regime_protocol.planned: Daily/weekly random windows across bull, bear, chop, high-vol, and low-vol crypto regimes after provider gate passes.
random_regime_protocol.reason_unavailable: No timestamp-safe exchange netflow observations were available.

orthogonality_controls.reason_unavailable: No timestamp-safe flow series, returns alignment, or provider publication lag sample was available.

decision_rationale: Hold rather than reject: the hypothesis was not tested and the required real on-chain data source was not proven unusable; external provider access/tool support is the blocker.
warnings: Do not substitute BTC/ETH OHLCV, volume, or price-only data for exchange netflow.
Do not use --data-csv or CSV-backed qfa backtests for this issue.
Perpetual implementation must include funding when unblocked.
